title: Walfos Bread Knife, Stainless Steel Serrated Slice Knife, Ultra-Sharp, One-Piece Design Ergonomic Handle and 8-Inch / 20cm Blade, Ideal for Slicing Bread, Bagels, Cake
features: HIGH QUALITY STAINLESS STEEL – WALFOS Bread Knife blade is made of food grade stainless steel with high rust resistance and wear resistance performance, it has a higher hardness after heat treatment (quenching and tempering). Sturdy and more duranble than others.

QUICK & CLEAN CUT THROUGH BREAD – Ultra-sharp serrated edge on blade provide a quick and clean cut, easily get the perfect slice of bread with less crumbs, you can cuts through a variety of HARD crusted breads and pastries with ease.

SLEEK ERGONOMIC DESIGN – Ergonomically designed handle perfectly fits your palm for comfortable grip. Walfos Serrated Bread Knife can be used for continuous grip with reducing finger numbness or soreness, make cutting bread safer and more comfortable! (7.8'' blade with 5'' handle)

ONE PIECE DESIGN – Walfos Bread Slice Knife features a one-piece construction that does not hide dirt, safe for your health. No plastic, no wood, no screws, built to last. Simply hand wash it with warm soapy water and it will look as good as new. Dishwasher safe. (TIPS: Please clean and dry the knife in time after using!)

GOOD SERVICE – If you have the slightest problem with our product,please feel free to give us a message ，We go out of our way to make sure every customer is happy and satisfied with our product and service.Order now, safe and secure, with Amazon Prime
description: Product Description WALFOS mission and promise 1. Walfos bread knives have made it their mission to bring the art of classic craftsmanship to your kitchen. 2. Every knife from walfos bread knives goes through an extremely rigorous test before it reaches you. From the very beginning, no mistake is allowed. 3. The ergonomic handle fits comfortably in the hand of any size and cuts with little effort. 4. Walfos is committed to providing high quality and innovative kitchen products that meet daily demands. In addition, we strive to provide unbeatable service to our customers.
